resumeBrief.instruction: Use this file as the source of truth for session restore. Only open the listed files first.
resumeBrief.currentState: Preparing commit and push to GitHub
resumeBrief.nextAction: Review git diff, commit the claude-forge upgrade, and push main
avoidReading: Do not scan the full repo unless the brief is missing something critical.
Do not open memory/decisions.md, memory/patterns.md, or memory/errors.md unless the current task needs them.

checkpointPolicy.closeAction: If usage reaches the stop threshold, save and resume in a fresh session.

contextWindow.policy: Warn at 70% used, checkpoint at 85% used, stop at 95% used.
